name: STATUS MATRIX

meta.form: entities x stages grid with status word + color
meta.data_required: rows of entities, columns of ordered stages, one status enum per cell

use_when: readiness tracking: systems x stages, packages x gates, sites x milestones
the reader looks up THEIR row
8 rows and 6 stage columns or fewer
not_when: more than 8 rows (split by area or paginate)
single-stage status (a list with chips does it)

data_shape.title: string, action title stating the readiness finding with a number
data_shape.eyebrow: string caps, rendered only when the DL chrome asks for it
data_shape.columns: array of ordered stage names, caps
data_shape.rows: array of {label, cells: [status enum per column]}

scale.note: no scale; a matrix is a lookup, not a measurement

rules: status is ALWAYS swatch + word, never color alone
stage columns in process order, never re-sorted
rows in the reader's natural order (system number, site), not by health
na cells show the nil hyphen with the hairline swatch
no zebra striping; hairline row rules only
anti_patterns: sorting rows by health (readers lose their row)
qa: cells per row equal column count
title states the readiness finding with a number
